productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Floral Print Casual Shoes
description: The Chuck Taylor All Star is a symbol of originality and self-expression the world over. The pioneers that put the lsquo;squeakrsquo; in Basketball have been an off-the-court favorite of rock stars and rebels for the past 60 years. Dedicated to basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All Star Floral print shoe from converse is also called Chucks, and comes in floral designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse has turned into a hot casual footwear favourite.UpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityStylish floral design in vibrant colours for styleCarbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durabilityMidsoleComfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioningOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionDiamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugsand grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrainsShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
